'''âj-r-sh''' ('''kajarash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pulley|pulley]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-r-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pulley|pulley]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-r-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kajarash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijarash|thijarash]] || [[word:jijarash|jijarash]] || [[word:shijarash|shijarash]] || [[word:kijarash|kijarash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujarash|thuthujarash]] || [[word:jujujarash|jujujarash]] || [[word:shushujarash|shushujarash]] || [[word:kukujarash|kukujarash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujarash|thujarash]] || [[word:jujarash|jujarash]] || [[word:shujarash|shujarash]] || [[word:kujarash|kujarash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujarash|thujarash]] || [[word:jujarash|jujarash]] || [[word:shujarash|shujarash]] || [[word:kujarash|kujarash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejarash|thejarash]] || [[word:jejarash|jejarash]] || [[word:shejarash|shejarash]] || [[word:kejarash|kejarash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojarash|thothojarash]] || [[word:jojojarash|jojojarash]] || [[word:shoshojarash|shoshojarash]] || [[word:kokojarash|kokojarash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojarash|thojarash]] || [[word:jojarash|jojarash]] || [[word:shojarash|shojarash]] || [[word:kojarash|kojarash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojarash|thojarash]] || [[word:jojarash|jojarash]] || [[word:shojarash|shojarash]] || [[word:kojarash|kojarash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjarash|thĂŠjarash]] || [[word:jĂŠjarash|jĂŠjarash]] || [[word:shĂŠjarash|shĂŠjarash]] || [[word:kĂŠjarash|kĂŠjarash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajarash|thathajarash]] || [[word:jajajarash|jajajarash]] || [[word:shashajarash|shashajarash]] || [[word:kakajarash|kakajarash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajarash|thajarash]] || [[word:jajarash|jajarash]] || [[word:shajarash|shajarash]] || [[word:kajarash|kajarash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajarash|thajarash]] || [[word:jajarash|jajarash]] || [[word:shajarash|shajarash]] || [[word:kajarash|kajarash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajarash|shajarash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajarash|goshajarash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajarash|gokishajarash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajarashnĂŒ|shajarashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajarashnknĂŒ|goshajarashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajarashnĂŒ|gokishajarashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajarashĂ«|shajarashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajarashnkshĂ«|goshajarashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajarashĂ«|gokishajarashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajarashro|shajarashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajarashnkro|goshajarashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajarashro|gokishajarashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajarashmu|shajarashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajarashnkmu|goshajarashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajarashmu|gokishajarashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajarasher|shajarasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajarashnksher|goshajarashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajarasher|gokishajarasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajarashng|shajarashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajarashnkng|goshajarashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajarashng|gokishajarashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajarashya|shajarashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajarashnkya|goshajarashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajarashya|gokishajarashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajarashyam|shajarashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajarashnkyam|goshajarashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajarashyam|gokishajarashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajarashnĂŒshĂ«|shajarashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajarashnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajarashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajarashnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajarashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajarashnĂŒro|shajarashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajarashnknĂŒro|goshajarashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajarashnĂŒro|gokishajarashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajarashnĂŒmu|shajarashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajarashnknĂŒmu|goshajarashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajarashnĂŒmu|gokishajarashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajarashĂ«nĂŒ|shajarashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajarashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajarashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajarashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajarashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajarashĂ«ro|shajarashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajarashnkshĂ«ro|goshajarashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajarashĂ«ro|gokishajarashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajarashĂ«mu|shajarashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajarashnkshĂ«mu|goshajarashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajarashĂ«mu|gokishajarashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajarashronĂŒ|shajarashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajarashnkronĂŒ|goshajarashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajarashronĂŒ|gokishajarashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajarashroshĂ«|shajarashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajarashnkroshĂ«|goshajarashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajarashroshĂ«|gokishajarashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajarashromu|shajarashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajarashnkromu|goshajarashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajarashromu|gokishajarashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajarashmunĂŒ|shajarashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajarashnkmunĂŒ|goshajarashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajarashmunĂŒ|gokishajarashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajarashmushĂ«|shajarashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajarashnkmushĂ«|goshajarashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajarashmushĂ«|gokishajarashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajarashmuro|shajarashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajarashnkmuro|goshajarashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajarashmuro|gokishajarashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
